news.title:
NHPC board approves monetization of Uri II and Dhauliganga cash flows.
Monetization in FY 2026-27, applies to Return on Equity portion.
news.summary:
NHPC board approves monetization of Uri II and Dhauliganga cash flows.
Monetization in FY 2026-27, applies to Return on Equity portion.

news.title:
NHPC's Board to meet on April 14, 2026, to discuss cash flow monetization.
Proposal includes monetizing future cash flows from power stations for FY 2026-27.
news.summary:
NHPC's Board to meet on April 14, 2026, to discuss cash flow monetization.
Proposal includes monetizing future cash flows from power stations for FY 2026-27.

news.title:
Stocks to watch include TCS, GM Breweries, NTPC, Bosch, NHPC, and KEC.
Updates include corporate announcements and brief company highlights.

news.title:
Bosch to acquire Bosch Chassis for ₹9,068.7 Cr; Lupin gets USFDA nod for diabetes drug.
TCS, NHPC, and others to report Q4 results; NTPC signs nuclear MoU with EDF.
news.summary:
Bosch to acquire Bosch Chassis for ₹9,068.7 Cr; Lupin gets USFDA nod for diabetes drug.
TCS, NHPC, and others to report Q4 results; NTPC signs nuclear MoU with EDF.

news.title:
Cabinet approves ₹26,069.5 cr for NHPC's 1720 MW Kamala Hydro Project in Arunachal Pradesh.
Project completion in 96 months; expected annual generation is 6870 MUs with flood control support.
news.summary:
Cabinet approves ₹26,069.5 cr for NHPC's 1720 MW Kamala Hydro Project in Arunachal Pradesh.
Project completion in 96 months; expected annual generation is 6870 MUs with flood control support.

news.title:
NHPC's subsidiary NHDC received a Rs. 231.8 Cr tax demand, including interest.
NHPC increased its shareholding in Ratle Hydro from 49.7% to 51%.
news.summary:
NHPC's subsidiary NHDC received a Rs. 231.8 Cr tax demand, including interest.
NHPC increased its shareholding in Ratle Hydro from 49.7% to 51%.

news.title:
NHPC signed an agreement with JKSPDCL for Uri I and Dulhasti hydro projects.
Projects have 500 MW capacity and will operate on BOOT basis for 40 years.
news.summary:
NHPC signed an agreement with JKSPDCL for Uri I and Dulhasti hydro projects.
Projects have 500 MW capacity and will operate on BOOT basis for 40 years.

news.title:
NHPC board approves borrowing up to Rs. 8,000 crore in FY26-27.
Funds via bonds, private placements, term loans, or ECBs for operations.
news.summary:
NHPC board approves borrowing up to Rs. 8,000 crore in FY26-27.
Funds via bonds, private placements, term loans, or ECBs for operations.

news.title:
UBS upgrades Power Grid, NTPC, NHPC to 'Buy', citing defensive play and summer demand boost.
Target prices raised: Power Grid Rs 340, NTPC Rs 432, NHPC Rs 88; robust growth visibility cited.
news.summary:
UBS upgrades Power Grid, NTPC, NHPC to 'Buy', citing defensive play and summer demand boost.
Target prices raised: Power Grid Rs 340, NTPC Rs 432, NHPC Rs 88; robust growth visibility cited.

news.title:
Cabinet approves SHP Development Scheme FY 2026-31 with ₹2,584.6 cr outlay, targeting 1,500 MW capacity and rural development.
Stocks like SJVN, Tata Power, NHPC, BHEL, and Triveni Turbine expected to benefit from SHP projects and indigenous manufacturing focus.
news.summary:
Cabinet approves SHP Development Scheme FY 2026-31 with ₹2,584.6 cr outlay, targeting 1,500 MW capacity and rural development.
Stocks like SJVN, Tata Power, NHPC, BHEL, and Triveni Turbine expected to benefit from SHP projects and indigenous manufacturing focus.

news.title:
NHPC shares gain 1.5%, trading at ₹78.04 as Cabinet may discuss hydro power projects.
The proposed scheme aims to boost small hydro projects, improving clean energy and access in remote areas.
news.summary:
NHPC shares gain 1.5%, trading at ₹78.04 as Cabinet may discuss hydro power projects.
The proposed scheme aims to boost small hydro projects, improving clean energy and access in remote areas.

news.title:
NHPC Ltd declared Commercial Operation (CoD) of Unit-1 (250 MW) of Subansiri Lower HE Project.
With this, CoD of three units (750 MW) is completed; remaining units' CoD updates pending.
news.summary:
NHPC Ltd declared Commercial Operation (CoD) of Unit-1 (250 MW) of Subansiri Lower HE Project.
With this, CoD of three units (750 MW) is completed; remaining units' CoD updates pending.

news.title:
NHPC Limited has issued Rs. 2000 crore 7.29% AH Series Bonds on private placement.
The bonds, with a 15-year tenor, are unsecured, non-convertible, and taxable, listed on BSE and NSE.
news.summary:
NHPC Limited has issued Rs. 2000 crore 7.29% AH Series Bonds on private placement.
The bonds, with a 15-year tenor, are unsecured, non-convertible, and taxable, listed on BSE and NSE.

news.title:
NHPC accepts bids worth ₹20B for STRPP bonds with 6-15 year maturities.
The bonds are separately transferable and redeemable, as per three bankers.
news.summary:
NHPC accepts bids worth ₹20B for STRPP bonds with 6-15 year maturities.
The bonds are separately transferable and redeemable, as per three bankers.

news.title: NHPC reveals Arbitral Tribunal's ruling favoring HCC in Kishanganga HE Project case.
news.summary: NHPC reveals Arbitral Tribunal's ruling favoring HCC in Kishanganga HE Project case.

news.title:
Arbitral tribunal favored HCC with ₹227.8 Cr foreign currency claim; NHPC's counterclaim at ₹738.7 Cr.
Case pertains to Kishanganga hydroelectric project dispute; counterclaim arguments yet to initiate.
news.summary:
Arbitral tribunal favored HCC with ₹227.8 Cr foreign currency claim; NHPC's counterclaim at ₹738.7 Cr.
Case pertains to Kishanganga hydroelectric project dispute; counterclaim arguments yet to initiate.

news.title:
NHPC initiates silt management plan as Salal reservoir's capacity drops 96% due to siltation.
The capacity loss follows decades of inoperable sediment management under the Indus Waters Treaty.
news.summary:
NHPC initiates silt management plan as Salal reservoir's capacity drops 96% due to siltation.
The capacity loss follows decades of inoperable sediment management under the Indus Waters Treaty.

news.title:
NHPC board approves Rs 5,703-cr hydropower projects in J&K.
Investments depend on implementation agreement with J&K govt and approvals.
news.summary:
NHPC board approves Rs 5,703-cr hydropower projects in J&K.
Investments depend on implementation agreement with J&K govt and approvals.
